name: Benz Mining Corp.
analysis: BNZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 37% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.1200, stop A$1.5939, target A$2.3900 (0.51:1) — then trail it.
